kids-month.title: June Kids Month at Yunshang!
paragraphs: The surprises never stop at Yunshang! We're making June all about our youngest guests. 👦🏻👧🏻 From now on, kids dining in at participating Yunshang locations will receive a FREE toy with their meal! ✨
kids-month.note: These toys are available while supplies last. First come, first served!

rice-noodle-festival-2026.title: 2026 Rice Noodle Festival | 2nd Bowl 50% Off
paragraphs: The annual Yunshang Rice Noodle Festival is back!

From May 25 to May 31, 2026, VIP members who dine in and order any two rice noodle bowls in the same transaction will receive 50% off the lower-priced bowl. All rice noodle bowls are included, and VIP members' 10% discount still applies.
Not a VIP member yet? Join in-store for $20 + tax and start saving immediately with this special offer, plus ongoing 10% off every visit.
compactLines: 📍 Available at all Yunshang Rice Noodle locations across Canada

ninth-anniversary.title: Yunshang 9th Anniversary
paragraphs: 🎉 Yunshang Rice Noodle Turns 9!
Nine amazing years, same delicious promise — and we're celebrating big! 🥢✨
🍜 $9.99 Signature Bowls
📅 Aug 30 – Sept 1, 2025
For 3 days only, enjoy 9 of our most-loved noodle bowls for just $9.99 each!
Available all day until 9PM at all Canada locations.
🎁 Grab Your $90 Anniversary Voucher Pack
We're celebrating with you — and this year's thank-you gift is our biggest yet!
10 coupons worth $90 in savings: free appetizers & desserts, BOGO noodles, half-price braised chicken, and more!
📅 Available Aug 23 – Sept 1 with a pre-tax spend of $40+.
First come, first served — while supplies last!
💛 Thank you for 9 incredible years. Let's raise our chopsticks and celebrate over a warm, delicious bowl!

member-week-noodle-festival.title: Yunshang Rice Noodle Festival 2025
paragraphs: Celebrate Yunshang's 1st Rice Noodle Festival! 🍜✨
For 7 days only (June 23rd~29th, 2025):
✨ VIP Members: Your second bowl 50% OFF - double the joy!
🎟️ Everyone Plays: Get a scratch card with every $40 spent - every card's a winner! Win free noodles, appetizers, desserts & more!
Date: June 23rd–29th, 2025
Available at all Yunshang locations across Canada
It's delicious, it's fun, it's full of surprises. Come celebrate with us!

pork-tripe-trial.title: New Dish Tasting Event
paragraphs: The New fall-winter limited edition—Chicken & Pork Tripe Rice Noodle Soup with Peppercorn is now available! Redeem Your New Dish Coupon & Complete a survey to enjoy a FREE TASTE of our autumn-winter rice noodle.
Dates:
November 15th, 2024 ~ December 15th, 2024
compactLines: 1. Please present the Free New Dish Coupon to our staff before ordering.
2. Limit one coupon per table per visit.
3. Dine-in only; not valid for takeout or delivery.
4. The survey must be fully completed to meet participation requirements.
5. All locations in Ontario are participating in this event.

eighth-anniversary.title: Yunshang 8th Anniversary
paragraphs: Yunshang Rice Noodle is celebrating its 8th anniversary this August! We have prepared special events and gifts for you to enjoy. Come and join us in celebrating this exciting milestone!

family-day.title: Free Coconut Lava Ball for Kids
paragraphs: Happy Family Day long weekend! From February 17th, 2024 to February 19th, 2024, children under 12 years old will receive a complimentary dessert!
This promo is available for dine-in only; One complimentary dessert will be provided per table. The promo is available at all Yunshang Rice Noodle stores in Ontario.

christmas-2023.title: 2023 Holiday Celebration
paragraphs: The promotion is valid from Dec. 23, 2023 until Jan. 1, 2024 for dine-in & takeout purchase. The promotion doesn't apply to 3rd party delivery orders.
- The promotion is available at all Yunshang Rice Noodles & Yang's Braised Chicken Rice stores in Canada.

- The voucher is valued at $10 each and can be used for in-store /takeout orders ($35 or more) from Jan. 2, 2024 until Feb. 29, 2024. The voucher can be used with VIP member discount but cannot be combined with any other offers.

seventh-anniversary.title: 7th Anniversary Celebration: Pay-What-You-Can Charity Event to Support SickKids
paragraphs: On August 19th, 2023, from 11am to 8pm, all of our Ontario stores will be offering a unique "Support-SickKids Menu" and we encourage you to order your favorite dishes and contribute an amount that feels comfortable for you. 100% of the proceeds collected on this day will be donated to the SickKids Foundation, providing crucial funding for new equipment, education for the next generation of SickKids caregivers, and research into innovative treatments and cures for illnesses and diseases.

To thank all Yunshang Rice Noodle VIP members for your love and support, we have also prepared a special gift – the "7th Anniversary VIP Coupon Book". This booklet includes 12 vouchers with a total value of $85, featuring $10 voucher, complimentary coupons for various appetizers, and more! All Yunshang Rice Noodle VIP members can get this booklet for free!
